message:
fix(safety): extension fs_op_list scan limit, TOCTOU cleanup, onboarding queue hardening

src/extensions.rs:
- Add LS_SCAN_HARD_LIMIT check in fs_op_list() to prevent unbounded
  directory enumeration from extensions — mirrors the same guard in
  the LsTool, ensuring extensions cannot consume unbounded memory
  by listing a directory with millions of entries

src/extensions_js.rs:
- Remove unused repair_mode and repair_events variable bindings in
  the module loader closure (dead code after the TOCTOU refactor)

src/bin/ext_onboarding_queue.rs:
- Add #[allow(clippy::struct_field_names)] on QueueSummary
- Replace bare "as i32" cast on repo_rank with i32::try_from()
  saturating to i32::MAX to prevent wraparound on extreme values
- Collapse redundant Some(_) => 0.0 and None => 0.0 match arms into
  Some(_) | None => 0.0
- Make recency_bonus() const fn
- Remove unnecessary .clone() on `all` in QueueOutput construction

src/main.rs:
- Simplify handle_config() to return () instead of Result<()> since
  it only prints and never errors; add #[allow(clippy::unnecessary_wraps)]
  annotation and update call sites to drop the ? operator

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
